name: andrej-karpathy-skills-for-codex
description: A Codex-native skill package inspired by Andrej Karpathy's coding-agent guidance: reason first, keep changes small, edit surgically, and verify outcomes.

interface.shortDescription: Apply careful coding-agent discipline in Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native skill inspired by Andrej Karpathy's public observations about coding-agent failure modes and by community skill packages. It helps Codex surface assumptions, avoid overbuilding, keep diffs narrow, and verify the result.
defaultPrompt: Apply Karpathy-style coding-agent discipline to this task.
Review this change for assumptions, overengineering, unrelated edits, and weak verification.
Keep the implementation simple and verify the smallest meaningful outcome.
